part.text:
Implemented context parameter addition across the repository.

- Added `ctx context.Context` to all client methods: `client.renewToken`, `client.get`, `client.post`, `client.swapToken`, `client.renewLease`, `client.revokeToken`, `client.revokeLease`, `client.lookupToken`, `client.ping`, `client.capabilities`.
- Updated `newClient` to accept `ctx` and propagate it to callers.
- Updated `toProto`, `toStorageStaticStore`, `toStorageVaultStore`, `NewService`, `validateUpdateRequest`, `validateCreateRequest`, `extractClientCertAndPk`, and `decodePemBlocks` to include `ctx context.Context`.
- Updated all relevant call sites automatically to pass `context.Background()` as the default argument.
- Adjusted other related functions (e.g., `toProto` in handlers already had `ctx`, so no change needed).

All patches passed type-checking and updated call sites accordingly.
